title: China won’t win the AI race but would it be much worse if it did?
summary: China won’t win the AI race but would it be much worse if it did?
whyItMatters: It seems to me accepted wisdom in the West that the US owned labs must “beat” the Chinese labs in the race for AGI/ASI. Even those who don’t think there will be a winner, that essentially the race is to see which country’s AI will kill/disempower us first, seem to believe that if there has to be a winner then better it be the US labs.
